title: Conflict at work
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Organisational — sources of workplace conflict and resolution strategies.
learningObjectives: Identify sources: role ambiguity, scarce resources, personality.

simpleExplanation.title: When colleagues clash
simpleExplanation.summary: Workplace conflict arises from competing goals and unclear roles — managed well it sparks innovation; managed badly it destroys morale.

sections.content: **Conflict at work** (4.3.3) completes 4.3. Apply **Thomas-Kilmann modes** to scenarios.
